Interface IFIDSet

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control the FID Set.

[Guid("D79BDAF1-CAA8-11D2-B2BE-0000F878229E")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IFIDSet

Properties

IDs

Enumerates the object ids in the FID set.

IEnumIDs IDs { get; }

Property Value

IEnumIDs
